CONTENT.Club career: On 15 May 2018, Stotsky moved from FC Ufa to FC Krasnodar, signing a 4-year contract. On 25 January 2022, his contract with Krasnodar was terminated by mutual consent. On the next day, he signed with Nizhny Novgorod. Stotsky left Pari NN in June 2024, as his contract expired.
CONTENT.International: Stotsky made his debut for the Russia national football team on 10 September 2018 in a friendly against Czech Republic.
CONTENT.External links: Dmitry Stotsky at Sportbox.ru (in Russian)Dmitry Stotsky at FootballFacts.ru (in Russian)Dmitry Stotsky at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Dmitry Valeryevich Stotsky (Russian: Дмитрий Валерьевич Стоцкий; born 1 December 1989) is a Russian professional football player. His current position is right back, but he has been deployed to many other positions, including left back and wide midfielder on either side.
